spec.name: fermi_lat_grb_timing_v1
spec.hypothesis: Photon arrival-time offsets from Fermi-LAT GRBs are correlated with photon energy (in GeV) scaled by luminosity distance (in Mpc), consistent with a linear Lorentz-invariance-violating dispersion relation of the form: delta_t = s * E * D_L.
spec.primary_statistic: OLS slope of timing_offset_s ~ energy_GeV × distance_Mpc (units: seconds per [GeV × Mpc]). Computed by reality_audit.data_analysis.mock_timing_pipeline.timing_slope().
spec.null_model: permutation_energy_shuffle: energies shuffled within each source 500 times (2000 for publication-quality); timing offsets and distances held fixed. Null distribution: OLS slopes from shuffled data. P-value: fraction of null slopes at least as extreme as observed.
spec.signal_model: timing_delay_linear (n=1): delta_t_LIV = s * energy_GeV * distance_Mpc where s = 1 / E_QG,1 / c in appropriate units. Recovery test uses s = 5e-4 s/(GeV·Mpc). Exclusion target: E_QG,1 > 10 * E_Planck (~1.22e19 GeV).
spec.notes: PHASE 5 — first real public-data analysis run. Data source: Fermi-LAT GRB photon event catalogs, local CSV/FITS-derived files. Minimum viable dataset: ≥5 GRBs with confirmed spectroscopic redshift, ≥5 events per GRB, energy range 0.1–300 GeV. Blinding: freeze_immediately=False required throughout real ingest. Unblinding condition: all quality-control checks pass per docs/FERMI_LAT_QC_CHECKLIST.md. No discovery claim is allowed on the basis of partial, incomplete, or unvalidated ingest. Exclusion bound may be reported without full discovery evidence. This plan was frozen BEFORE real data was touched — 2026-04-20.

required_data_fields: photon_energy (GeV or MeV with unit declared)
planned_robustness_checks: jackknife: drop one GRB at a time, recompute slope
energy-bin split: low-E (<1 GeV) vs high-E (>1 GeV)
subluminal vs superluminal search (s > 0 and s < 0)
sensitivity curve: slope limit as function of total N

unblinding_requires: no partial-ingest warning in ingest manifest

stopping_rules: STOP if n_events < 30 total after quality cuts
STOP if any source has n_events < 5 after quality cuts
STOP if redshift coverage < 5 independent GRBs
STOP if recovery test fails at injection strength 5e-4
STOP if duplicate event IDs exceed 0.1% of total
STOP if energy-unit metadata is missing and cannot be inferred
supplementary.discovery_claim_policy: No detection claim is permitted unless: (1) p_value < 3e-7, (2) all robustness checks have been run and pass, (3) at least one independent analysis has been registered and run, (4) unblinding was performed exactly once. Partial ingest or single-dataset significance is NOT sufficient for a discovery claim under any circumstances.
supplementary.exclusion_bound_policy: If p_value > 0.05 after a complete validated ingest, a 95% C.L. exclusion bound on E_QG,1 may be reported. Report as: E_QG,1 > X * E_Planck (95% C.L.) where X is computed from the 95th percentile of the null-permutation slope distribution converted to energy units.
supplementary.registration_status: FROZEN — do not modify this file after first data access
